resources.string: Source folder does not exist or is not a directory
Storage permission required to access files

Usage Instructions:

1. Enter source code folder path
2. You can paste the path directly
3. Click 'Example Path' to see path format
4. Check 'Exclude build folder' to skip cache files
5. Click 'Filter File Types' to manage excluded file formats
6. Click 'Start Integration' to begin
7. Output file will be created as 'SourceCodeIntegration.txt'

Output Contents:
• Project tree structure
• Complete content of all text files
• File size ranking

Default Supported File Types:
• Code files: .java, .kt, .xml, .gradle, etc.
• Config files: .properties, .pro, .gitignore, etc.
• Script files: .sh, .bat, .cmd, etc.
• Text files: .txt, .md, etc.

Default Filtered File Types:
• Images, audio, video files
• Archives
• Binary executables
• Documents, etc.
• Supports custom filtering

File Ranking:
• Shows largest text files in source folder
• Helps identify large config files
